query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('tool', 'multi', 'MAP_Sensor', 'all', 'MAPSensorData.xlsx', 'xlsx', 0, 'MAP sensor pressure/voltage conversion data table', 'Calculator: MAP sensor data conversion'),
('tool', 'multi', 'PPEI_Calcs', 'all', 'PPEIAutomotiveCalculations_Rev1.xlsx', 'xlsx', 0, 'PPEI master automotive calculations spreadsheet Rev1', 'Calculator: comprehensive automotive calculations'),
('tool', 'multi', 'T56_Trans', 'all', 'T56_gear_calculator.xls', 'xls', 0, 'T56 manual transmission gear ratio calculator', 'Calculator: T56 gear ratios, speed/RPM'),
('tool', 'multi', 'Timing', 'all', 'timingcalcV3.1.xls', 'xls', 0, 'Injection timing calculator V3.1', 'Calculator: timing advance/retard calculations'),
('tool', 'multi', 'Timing', 'all', 'TimingCalcV4.xlsx', 'xlsx', 0, 'Injection timing calculator V4 (latest)', 'Calculator: timing advance/retard calculations v4'),
('tool', 'multi', 'TireGear', 'all', 'TireGearandTrans(version1).xlsx', 'xlsx', 0, 'Tire size, gear ratio, and transmission speed calculator', 'Calculator: tire/gear/trans speed-RPM'),
('tool', 'ford', '6R100', 'all', 'TOS_VehSpeedCalculator_6R100.xls', 'xls', 0, 'TOS & Vehicle Speed Calculator for Ford 6R100 6-speed', 'Calculator: Ford 6R100 TOS and vehicle speed'),
('tool', 'dodge', '48RE', 'all', 'TOS_VehSpeedCalculator_48re.xls', 'xls', 0, 'TOS & Vehicle Speed Calculator for Dodge 48RE', 'Calculator: Dodge 48RE TOS and vehicle speed'),
('tool', 'dodge', '68RFE', 'all', 'TOS_VehSpeedCalculator_68rfe.xls', 'xls', 0, 'TOS & Vehicle Speed Calculator for 68RFE 6-speed', 'Calculator: 68RFE TOS and vehicle speed'),
('tool', 'gm', 'Aisin', 'all', 'TOS_VehSpeedCalculator_Aisin.xls', 'xls', 0, 'TOS & Vehicle Speed Calculator for Aisin 6-speed', 'Calculator: Aisin TOS and vehicle speed'),
('tool', 'gm', 'Allison', 'all', 'TOS_VehSpeedCalculator_Allison.xls', 'xls', 0, 'TOS & Vehicle Speed Calculator for Allison 6-speed', 'Calculator: Allison TOS and vehicle speed'),
('tool', 'multi', 'TransCalc', 'all', 'TransmissionCalc.xlsx', 'xlsx', 0, 'General transmission calculator', 'Calculator: general transmission calculations'),
('tool', 'ford', '10R80', 'all', '10R80rpmandTCCConverter.xlsx', 'xlsx', 0, '10R80 RPM and TCC converter reverse RPM calculator', 'Calculator: Ford 10R80 RPM/TCC reverse calc'),
('tool', 'dodge', '68RFE', 'all', '68RFELockupSchedule.xls', 'xls', 0, '68RFE lockup schedule calculator', 'Calculator: 68RFE TCC lockup timing schedule'),
('tool', 'multi', 'Engine', 'all', 'Engineconversiontool.xls', 'xls', 0, 'Engine unit conversion tool', 'Calculator: engine parameter unit conversions'),
('tool', 'multi', 'AFR', 'all', 'equivalenceratiocalc.xls', 'xls', 0, 'Equivalence ratio / AFR / lambda calculator', 'Calculator: AFR/lambda/equivalence ratio'),
('tool', 'multi', 'VCM_Extractor', 'all', 'VCM_EXTRACTOR.zip', 'zip', 0, 'VCM Extractor - HPT to BIN converter. C# source code with Cipher.cs for decryption. Converts HPTuners .hpt files to raw .bin format.', 'Converter tool: .hpt to .bin. Uses cipher/encryption. C# WinForms app.'),
('tool', 'multi', 'EFD_Reader', 'all', 'EFD_Reader.zip', 'zip', 0, 'EFD Reader - Cummins EFD file parser. Uses EVP_CIPHER for decryption. Parses EFD container format with FileSignature, Description, Microprocessor, AuditLog elements.', 'Converter tool: EFD parser with crypto. C# WinForms. Elements: FileSignature, Description, Comment, Microprocessor, AuditLog.'),
('tool', 'multi', 'EfiReader', 'all', 'EfiReader.zip', 'zip', 0, 'EFI Reader - EFI to BIN converter. C# source with FileParser.cs and FileParserLocked.cs. Includes HexBox viewer and resource arrays for conversion tables.', 'Converter tool: .efi to .bin. C# WinForms. Has locked/unlocked parsers and offset tables.'),
('reference', 'multi', 'PCM_Security', 'all', 'PCMHacking.pdf', 'pdf', 0, 'PCM Hacking reference - security research techniques for ECU reverse engineering', 'Security research reference document');
command:
